label: p10_task40_gguf_prefill_vs_paro_diagnosis
scope: Compare GGUF 4K/32K prefill behavior against retained PARO evidence after chunked-prefill correctness fixes.
hardware_caveat: GGUF diagnostics are local AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX / gfx1100 24 GiB. PARO retained/source-lineage rows are W7900/gfx1100. Treat cross-hardware/model deltas as directional only.

correctness_gate.pytest: PYTHONPATH=. uv run pytest tests/test_qwen35_gguf_runner.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_full_attention_gpu.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_p10_x2_layer_correctness.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_chunked_prefill.py -q -> 11 passed
correctness_gate.gguf_smoke: finite logits in 4K/128 and 32K smoke commands; no full KL/text-quality gate for this diagnostic artifact

gguf_current_4k_128.command: HIPENGINE_GGUF_ALLOW_UNSAFE_QWEN35MOE_FASTPATHS=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. uv run python scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --prompt-length 4096 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 1 --warmup-runs 1 --measured-runs 3 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --use-gemv-decode --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/hipengine-gguf-task40-4k-128-repeat.json

p52_4k_128.correctness: generated_first_two_match true in artifact; diagnostic_retained, performance_claim=false

source_lineage_4k_128.command: cd /home/lhl/amd-gpu-tuning && export NANOVLLM_AMD_ROUTER_PREFILL_MIN_TOKENS=512; export NANOVLLM_PARO_GEMV_PACK8_REPLACE=1; export NANOVLLM_PARO_LM_HEAD_W8A16=1; export NANOVLLM_PARO_MOE_STACKED_COMPACT=1; export NANOVLLM_PARO_MOE_STACKED_REPACK_REPLACE=1; export NANOVLLM_PARO_GEMV_PACK8_TRANSPOSE_MIN_OUT_FEATURES=999999; export NANOVLLM_PARO_MOE_GROUPED_DEVICE_GATHER=1; export NANOVLLM_PARO_MOE_GROUPED_STACKED_MAX_TOKENS=4096; export NANOVLLM_PARO_MOE_GROUPED_STACKED_WEIGHTED_LANES=1; export NANOVLLM_PARO_MOE_GROUPED_STACKED_SILU_ROTATE_FUSED=1; export NANOVLLM_PARO_WMMA_GEMM=1; export NANOVLLM_PARO_WMMA_COMPACT=1; export NANOVLLM_PARO_WMMA_MIN_TOKENS=64; export NANOVLLM_PARO_GEMV_V8=1; export NANOVLLM_PARO_NATIVE_ROUTER=1; export NANOVLLM_PARO_FULL_ATTN_FUSED_GATE=1; export NANOVLLM_PARO_MOE_SILU_DOWN_ROTATE_FUSED=1; export NANOVLLM_PARO_SHARED_EXPERT_W8A16=1; export NANOVLLM_PARO_LINEAR_ATTN_AB_FUSED=1; export NANOVLLM_PARO_LINEAR_ATTN_QKV_Z_PACK8_FUSED=1; export NANOVLLM_PARO_FULL_ATTN_QK_PACK8_FUSED=1; export NANOVLLM_AMD_PAGED_ATTN_GQA_GROUPED_CTX=1; export NANOVLLM_AMD_PAGED_ATTN_MAX_SPLITS=512; PYTHONPATH=nano-vllm-amd:paroquant mamba run -n therock --no-capture-output python3 scripts/bench_paro_native_engine.py --prompt-len 4096 --decode-len 128 --decode-use-step-graph-replay --output /tmp/hipengine-parent-optimal-4k-128.json --json

p52_32k_128.correctness: generated_first_two_match true in artifact; diagnostic_retained, performance_claim=false

known_prefill_profile_before_review.scope: 512-token GGUF prefill, diagnostic profile before V3 review fixes; use for priority hints only

diagnosis: GGUF prefill is not obviously the blocker after chunked-prefill review fixes: current 32K diagnostic is within a few percent of retained/source PARO prefill rows, but cross-hardware/model differences prevent a retained claim.

The 4K current-code repeat is stable but below the earlier P10.D8 retained 4K median by about 1.8%; because the short/mid chunk policy stays unchunked, the most suspicious review-era change is switching AOTriton prefill attention from V2 to V3 for the non-chunked start=0 path.

Before kernel work, capture current-code 4K and 32K rocprof prefill traces. If the 4K V3 delta is confirmed, first low-risk fix is a V2/V3 dispatch policy: use V2 when start=0 and max_seqlen_q==max_seqlen_k, keep V3 for true query chunks requiring bottom-right causal alignment.

If profiling shows the pre-review distribution still holds, dense_q8_0_wmma_prefill and GDN recurrent are the largest known prefill surfaces; full-attention is not the only target despite long context.

next_focus.highest_priority: Current-code rocprof + V2/V3 A/B for full-attention prefill at 4K and 32K query chunks.
next_focus.candidate_fix: Conditional AOTriton wrapper selection: V2 for unchunked start=0 full-context prefill, V3 for chunked start>0 or rows<end. Gate with chunked correctness test and 4K/32K smoke before retaining.
next_focus.secondary_if_profile_confirms: Optimize dense_q8_0_wmma_prefill / linear-attention GDN surfaces, since R0 prefill profile attributes ~22.6% and ~19.3% of 512-token prefill kernel time to those buckets.

decision: diagnostic only; no benchmark README/CHANGELOG update
